text: Waking up to you is the only vibe I need. 🌅
Good morning to the main character of my life. 🎭
Woke up and chose to be obsessed with you today. 💀
Morning bestie (lover variant). Hope you slay your meetings today. 💅
Real ones know that you're the best part of waking up. ☕
You're too iconic to be feeling this way. What can I do? 🥺
I'm literally on my way with your favorite drink. Don't move. 🧋
The vibe is off without your smile. Let's fix it together. 🫂
Sending you all the positive energy in the universe right now. 🪐✨
I actually have zero brain cells. I'm so sorry. 💀
I definitely fumbled the bag here. Can we restart? 🎮
Currently in my 'apology era'. My bad, baby. 🥀
I'm literally the clown of the year. Please forgive me? 🤡
No thoughts, just you. 🫠
You're literally my Roman Empire. 🏛️
Thinking about you is my personality trait now. 💅
Rent free. Always. 🏠💕
Just realized how much I'm winning because I have you. 🏆
Manifesting us in the same room right now. 🕯️🕯️
Missing you is actually physical pain. Come back soon. 🥺
Counting down the seconds until I can see your face. ⏳❤️
Let's go to that cute aesthetic café you saw on TikTok. ☕📸
Full send on a road trip this weekend? Just us. 🚗💨
Picnic date? I'll bring the snacks, you bring the vibes. 🧺🍇
Face card never declines. 💳✨
No one is doing it like you. Literally 1 of 1. 🥇
You're the blueprint. Everyone else is just a copy. 📐💅
I'm sorry for being a glitch in our matrix. I love you. 👾💔
My bad. I'm still learning how to be the person you deserve. 📈❤️
Goodnight to my favorite human. See you in my dreams. 🌙
Go to sleep knowing you're the best thing that ever happened to me. 🧸💤
You have my whole heart, no cap. 🧢❤️
Being with you is a whole experience. 10/10 would recommend. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I'm so glad we're mutually obsessed with each other. 🥰💅
Another day of being grateful you're my person. 💖
You're my favorite person to annoy. 🦖❤️
You're literally glowing today. Keep that energy. ✨🔋
Sleep tight. I’ll be the one dreaming about you. 🕊️✨
Real ones stay down for each other, and you're the realest. 💯
I'm your safe space. Whatever you need, I got you. 🏠❤️
My phone is boring when you're not texting me back. 📱💤
Let's do a late night drive with no destination. Just music and us. 🌌🎶
I'm locked in. Forever. 😤❤️
I hope your coffee is as strong as my feelings for you today. ☕💪
You're a rare distribution. Never change. 💎
